creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello. We only support the english language. If you have something in 
french please find a local mailinglist that might be able to assist you. 
Or translate the question so that we can actually understand it (I dont 
;-)). This is also something for ports@FreeBSD.org, please consider 
emailing your question there instead of submitting a PR. Thanks for 
using FreeBSD though, it's appreciated!
